introParagraphs: I'm a software developer passionate about Artificial Intelligence and Full-Stack Development. I build modern web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB, while exploring AI and Machine Learning with Python, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn.
I love turning ideas into real products, solving challenging problems, and continuously learning new technologies. I'm always building, experimenting, and sharing what I learn through my projects.

about.about: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer passionate about creating modern, fast and user-friendly applications. I enjoy solving challenging problems, learning new technologies and building products that people love to use.
